source_pr.title: planner: fix data race in the TestCacheHitInRc
source_pr.body:

symptoms: planner: fix data race in the TestCacheHitInRc
failure_signature: planner: fix data race in the TestCacheHitInRc
root_cause_explanation: The test executed prepared statements via `ExecutePreparedStmt(...)` but did not close the returned `RecordSet`, which can leave background operations running and trigger data race reports (especially when the test concurrently changes schema via `ALTER TABLE`). The patch stabilizes the test by capturing the returned `RecordSet` and closing it (`rs.Close()`) after each execution, removing the race window.
fix_pattern: Close the `RecordSet` returned by `ExecutePreparedStmt(...)` in `TestCacheHitInRc` to avoid data races when schema changes invalidate plan cache.

evidence: evidence: planner: fix data race in the TestCacheHitInRc
